title: simulator inconsistency(nedsted module and flatten f/f)
body:
I test simple gated f/f.
https://www.edaplayground.com/x/mLAH

Rivera,Questa follow convention 
vcs follows standards.
xcelium, and icarus verilog has inconsitent simulatorc
The results not the same depending on where f/f is, and signal path


26000000000000 ps, wr_en: 1 ,flop input : 11    - will be update to new value
26000000000000 ps, wr_en: 1 ,flop output: 00 11 00 11 - before rising edge 
36000000000000 ps, wr_en: 0 ,flop output: 00 11 11 11 - after  rising edge, expect update
